mention.description: Text trigger the bot reacts to (e.g., @botname).

allow_rooms.description: Optional allowlist of room IDs; empty means all rooms.

persona.description: Optional persona key to forward to Sacred Brain.

context_limit.description: How many recent text messages to include as context (best-effort).

api_key.description: Optional X-API-Key header value for Sacred Brain.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout when calling Sacred Brain.
